migrations.description: Create lcs.cid, lcs.sid_output, lcs.mid_sequence_state; enforce append-only triggers; add SID notify trigger from CID COMPILED inserts; alter lcs.frame_registry for CID/SID/MID integration columns.
Rollback migration 005: remove SID notify trigger/function, remove append-only triggers/functions, drop new tables, and remove frame_registry integration columns/constraints.

rollback_plan.verification: Verify lcs.cid/lcs.sid_output/lcs.mid_sequence_state are absent, frame_registry integration columns are absent, and trg_lcs_cid_notify_sid_worker + lcs.notify_sid_worker() are absent after rollback.

validation_steps.expected: All three values are non-null after forward migration.

validation_steps.step: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='lcs' AND table_name='frame_registry' AND column_name IN ('cid_compilation_rule','sid_template_id','mid_sequence_type','mid_delay_hours','mid_max_attempts');
SELECT count(*) FROM pg_trigger WHERE tgname='trg_lcs_cid_notify_sid_worker';
SELECT count(*) FROM pg_proc p JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace=n.oid WHERE n.nspname='lcs' AND p.proname='notify_sid_worker';

SELECT count(*) FROM pg_trigger WHERE tgname IN ('trg_lcs_cid_no_update','trg_lcs_cid_no_delete','trg_lcs_sid_output_no_update','trg_lcs_sid_output_no_delete','trg_lcs_mid_sequence_state_no_update','trg_lcs_mid_sequence_state_no_delete');
validation_steps.expected: Returns 6 to confirm append-only immutability triggers are installed.
